description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade. The exterior features a mix of white and light gray surfaces, with large rectangular windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The front of the house includes two distinct entryways, each with its own porch area—one with wooden steps and a small seating area, the other with a paved path and potted plants. A single tall, narrow tree and minimal landscaping accentuate the front yard, while the driveway leads to two separate garages. The rear and side elevations are more austere, with fewer windows and a focus on solid wall surfaces. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, dual entryways, and minimal landscaping, featuring a clean geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two entryways, porches, large windows, garages, and a tall tree with landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall surfaces, minimal windows, and the extension of the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view with limited window openings and a focus on the flat, blocky structure of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the geometric design and the rear porch area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Dual entryways with modern doors, one with wooden steps and porch seating, the other with a paved path, potted plants, and minimal overhang.
